sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n61642" key="lailafe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λαιλᾰφέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n61642.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sender of storms, PLeid.W.</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4085.tlg001:8:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.21</biblScope></bibl>. (For <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λαιλαπαφέτης</foreign>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνεμαφέτης</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
